TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Carrie Lam Cheng Yuet-ngor = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 5 jiyax 13 ka Carrie Lam Cheng Yuet-ngor ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Hoengkong ta sayang o kiya ka Carrie Lam Cheng Yuet-ngor, pnaah hngkawas 2017 idas 7 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ʦaɾɾiə lam ʦħəŋ juət-ŋoɾ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ʦaɾɾiə lam ʦħəŋ juət-ŋoɾ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ħoəŋkoŋ ta sajaŋ o kija ka ʦaɾɾiə lam ʦħəŋ juət-ŋoɾ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Carrie Lam Cheng Yuet-ngor = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 5 jiyax 13 ka Carrie Lam Cheng Yuet-ngor ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Hoengkong ta sayang o kiya ka Carrie Lam Cheng Yuet-ngor, pnaah hngkawas 2017 idas 7 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ʦaɾɾiə lam ʦħəŋ juət-ŋoɾ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ʦaɾɾiə lam ʦħəŋ juət-ŋoɾ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ħoəŋkoŋ ta sajaŋ o kija ka ʦaɾɾiə lam ʦħəŋ juət-ŋoɾ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
